mapper.sql: customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, id_type, id_no, org_code, credit_level, status, contact_person, contact_phone, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_customer ORDER BY created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_customer (customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, id_type, id_no, org_code, credit_level, status, contact_person, contact_phone, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{customerType}, #{idType}, #{idNo}, #{orgCode}, #{creditLevel}, #{status}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_customer SET customer_name = #{customerName}, customer_type = #{customerType}, id_type = #{idType}, id_no = #{idNo}, org_code = #{orgCode}, credit_level = #{creditLevel}, status = #{status}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_customer WHERE customer_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at
